name: IncidentCreateAttributes
description: Attributes for creating a new incident

title.description: The title of the incident describing what is affected and the nature of the issue

customer_impacted.description: Whether the incident is causing direct customer impact (required field for all incidents)

customer_impact_scope.description: Description of the customer groups or features affected by this incident

customer_impact_start.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when customer impact started, if known

severity.description: The severity level of the incident using SEV-N notation

state.description: The initial state of the incident

fields.description: Custom fields for the incident as configured in your organization settings

notification_handles.description: List of user and team notification handles to page on incident creation

handle.description: The Datadog handle or integration channel to notify

display_name.description: The display name for this notification handle
